Main
The demolition prices continued to rise, driven by scarcity of available tonnage
Source: Athenian Shipbrokers S.A

Week 31 2021 (2nd- 8th August)
SH IP R EC Y C LING MA R KET WEEKLY
The demolition prices continued to rise, driven
Indicative Demolition Prices
by scarcity of available tonnage. Cargo Tankers
concerns and the lockdown restrictions from
India USD 585/lt Ldt USD 595/lt Ldt
the surge of Covid-19, the upturn of the
Bangladesh USD 600/lt Ldt USD 610/lt Ldt
recycling markets seem will be continued in the Pakistan USD 585/lt Ldt USD 595/lt Ldt
rest of summer/monsoon months.
